draft.subject: Automating dispatch and scheduling at MEPS
draft.body:
Hi Billy,

Power and electrical services live on scheduling—technician availability, customer site access, equipment routing. Most dispatch operations still run on phone calls and spreadsheets.

We automate the intake and matching: customer calls in, system checks tech availability, sends them the right person, and routes the truck. Your dispatcher confirms and goes.

One electrical services company cut scheduling time by 70% and improved first-visit completion rates.

Interested in seeing how we could streamline Mobile Electric Power Solutions' dispatch?

Kevin Starr
Founder, Starr & Partners

personalization_notes: Referenced mobile electrical services, dispatch and scheduling pain points, named the company
